about.title: About
about.description: SaveState is a gamified savings app that helps you achieve financial goals through gamification.
about.creditsText: SaveState is developed by a team of enthusiasts who believe in financial education through gamification.
about.faq0q: How does the level system work?
about.faq0a: You earn XP for every transaction and quest completion. XP accumulates and when you reach a threshold you level up. Each level unlocks new features and rewards.
about.faq1a: A streak is the number of consecutive days you've been active in the app. A long streak gives bonus XP and unlocks special achievements. Don't break your streak!
about.faq2q: How to use a streak freeze?
about.faq2a: You can get a streak freeze from completing quests or the bonus wheel. Use it to preserve your streak for one day if you missed a day.
about.faq3q: How to create a challenge with a friend?
about.faq3a: Go to "Challenges" and tap "Create". Choose a friend, goal and duration. Your friend will receive a challenge request.
about.faq4a: Yes, SaveState is completely free. All features are available without subscription. The app is funded through optional ads and XP shop purchases.
about.faq5a: Go to "Statistics" → "Export". Choose a format (CSV, PDF or JSON), period and categories. Data will be saved or shared via the share sheet.

help.title: Help
help.faq0a: Open the home screen and tap "Add savings". Enter the amount, category and description. Your savings automatically count toward your goal, and you earn XP for each transaction.
help.faq1q: How to change the target amount?
help.faq1a: Go to "Goals" → select a goal → tap "Edit". Enter a new amount and confirm. Savings history is preserved, progress is recalculated automatically.
help.faq2a: XP (experience) are points you earn for actions in the app: savings, completing quests, streaks. Accumulating XP raises your level. Each level unlocks new features and bonuses.
help.faq3a: Quests are daily, weekly and special tasks. Daily quests refresh each morning, weekly quests every Monday. Completing quests earns you XP, coins and unique rewards.
help.faq4a: Go to "Profile" → "Invite a friend". Share the link via messenger. When your friend registers and makes their first savings, you both get bonus XP.
help.faq5a: In "Settings" choose "Connect bank". Select your bank from the list, authorize via the banking app. Supports MonoBank, PrivatBank, A-Bank and other Ukrainian banks.
help.faq6a: Go to "Statistics" → "Export". Choose format: CSV, PDF or JSON. Specify period and categories. Data will be saved on the device or shared via the share sheet.
help.tutorialDesc: Go through onboarding again to refresh your knowledge of the app's core features.
help.contactDesc: Have a question or issue? Our support team will respond within 24 hours.
